speaker: speaker1
text: Hi , Jack , how have you been ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Why ? Looks like you're feeling very down ! What happened ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Come on . For a man who's feeling so , down , there're usually two reasons . Either his career is going downhill , or he has a broken heart . Since you're so successful , it must be the latter .

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , you're right . I just broke up with Jane .

speaker: speaker1
text: Oh , I'm sorry . I thought you two were made for each ocher .

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , you never know . I'm ready for a commitment and want to settle down , but she says she wants to pursue her career while she's still young .

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , she is not to blame . It's always difficult to choose between career and family .

speaker: speaker1
text: Jack , I don't know what to say to comfort you , but cheer up ! There are plenty of fish in the sea and you'll find your soul mate , your perfect match !

speaker: speaker2
text: Yeah , but it's hard to forget her at moment . You know , we were together for almost five years . It's really hard ...
